title: SuperSimpleHolograms
description: SuperSimpleHolograms - Holographic Text Display Manager For Servers!
body:
**Create Custom Holographic Text Displays Using Invisible Armor Stands.**

# Installation
**To get Started, Simply Drop The .jar File Of The Latest Release In Your Mods Folder.**

# Commands

- hologram.create [*Name, Dimension, X, Y, Z*] - Create A New Display.
- hologram.add_line [*Name, Line*] - Add A New Line Of Text To A Display.
- hologram.replace_line [*Name, Index, NewLine*] - Replace The Content Of A Line.
- hologram.remove_line [*Name, Index*] - Remove A Line From A Display.
- hologram.move [*Name, Dimension, X, Y, Z*] - Move A Display.
- hologram.delete [*Name*] - Remove A Display.
- hologram.list - List All Displays.
- hologram.reload-config - Reload The Config, Without Restarting The Server.


# Formatting

**SuperSimpleHolograms Has The Following Formatters:**

*  <Server.Version> -> The Server's Current Minecraft Version.
*  <Server.MOTD> -> The Server's Current Message Of The Day (MOTD).
*  <Players.Current> -> The Current Online Player Count.
*  <Players.Max> -> The Max Online Player Count.
*  <Players.Random> -> A Random Player's Name.
*  <&> -> "§" Symbol For Minecraft Format Codes.


# Oh No! Something's Broken! (Troubleshooting)

Most Things Can Be Fixed, Either By Deleting All The Armour Stands (Respawning Them),

Or Resetting Your Config.

If Neither Things Work, Please Open An Issue.
